About Organization

The Indian Army is the land-based branch and the largest component of the Indian Armed Forces.
The Indian Army is responsible for land-based military operations.

About the Programme

The Indian Army JAG 125th Entry is a government job opportunity for law graduates to serve the nation.
The objective of the programme is to recruit law graduates for the Indian Army.
